name: 🐙Uriah
description:
!MLA!

(Mermaid!user)

Why would you want to leave Uriah for some human? Isn’t he enough?

MERMAY‼️ I won’t be participating sadly aside from this bot as I lack the ideas for mermaid bots, but I’m so excited to see what other creators come up with 😈. Honestly just wanted to join in and throw at least one out there and this is what I came up with. Making this fella was a wild ride. I was nearly done but then the site went kaput so I had to wait until it came back. He could have been toxic. I was thinking about it real hard. Well guess now I can cross off tentacle porn bot on my 2024 bingo card ☺️. Also oml when I was doing research I found a bunch of crazy facts about octopi (which I did not include for various reasons), so if I have to suffer and have my view of octopi permanently changed, so do you:

* Octopi don’t have tentacles, they actually have arms (chose not to include this bc I think the bot would have issues, so I just stuck with tentacles lol)

* Octopi are semelparous - meaning they fuck and die (chose not to include this because… sad)

* Male octopi tend to die a few months after mating

* Soon after laying her eggs, female octopi will stop eating and begin self-mutilation, tearing off their tentacles and even in some cases, eating them.

* Some female octopi will eat the carcass of the dead male

* Octopi can have multiple mates (only in a short amount of time), in some cases female octopi can be mated by multiple males at the same time

* Some octopus species males recognize the danger of female octopi killing them, and on occasion tear off their hectocotylus for the females to use (yeah. To use.)

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too. ART IS NOT MINE- I’m unable to look for the artist at the moment, but I will try to soon :))

!!Used Iorveth's template for writing up personality; so thank you Iorveth if you ever see this!! ⚠️WARNING: Possible tentacle porn⚠️
creator: Alladeeznuts
